name: Paupiettes De Boeuf May 1980
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the beef into 6 equal size steaks.
2. Pound the steaks thin.
3. Grind the remaining meat along with the bacon, parsley, garlic, salt, pepper, and thyme in a food processor.
4. Season the steaks and place the ground filling on one side. Roll them up and secure with strings or toothpicks.
5. Brown the rolls, 3 at a time, in oil and transfer to a plate.
6. Discard any fat from the pan. Add 2 tablespoons of oil and cook the onions until soft. Add tomatoes and carrot, cooking for 2 minutes.
7. Add the rolls and bay leaf to the pan. Pour in the beef broth and simmer for half an hour. Pour in the wine and bring to a boil.
8. Reduce heat and continue simmering until tender, adding more broth as needed, about 1 to 1 1/2 hours. Check seasoning with salt.
